prompt: Tap left hole card before final turn-compression choice.
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before range action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Left hole card is the hole-card anchor here because the exact blocker or pair piece tells you whether the compressed turn can still pressure.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The left hole card is the right hand cue here because that blocker or pair component decides whether the compressed turn should pressure or stay controlled.
